inProgress.title: Free Developer CLI — LLM Comparison from Terminal

recentWork.title: Free Developer CLI — LLM Comparison from Terminal
recentWork.summary: Built core CLI (packages/cli): compare, models, info, providers commands. 20 models, 7 providers. Styled tables. Telemetry with --no-telemetry opt-in. Conversion CTA. CI workflow. Fixed .gitignore, removed dist/ from tracking. PR marked ready for review.

recentWork.title: Archive Dormant Repos
recentWork.summary: Archived 3 dormant repos: llmtrust-monorepo, llmtrust-chat, llmtrust-back
